zh.lifeSummary: 當Bathsheba Barrett於1518年出生在英國英格蘭艾可艾維勒時，她的父親William Barrett31歲，母親Margaret Love29歲。她於1540年與Thomas Oxford在英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年在英國維爾爾維斯特波利享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bathsheba Barrett于1518年出生在英国英格兰艾可艾維勒时，她的父亲William Barrett31岁，母亲Margaret Love29岁。她于1540年与Thomas Oxford在英国英格兰維爾爾布拉頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1545年在英国維爾爾維斯特波利享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: Bathsheba
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘daughter of the oath’ in Hebrew. It was the name of the woman who became the wife of King David, after he had disposed of her husband Uriah, and mother of King Solomon (2 Samuel 11–12). It was popular with the Puritans in England and is the name of the central character in  Thomas Hardy's  Far from the Madding Crowd, but it is found only occasionally today.

en.lifeSummary: When Bathsheba Barrett was born in 1518, in Aveley, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Barrett, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Love, was 29. She married Thomas Oxford in 1540, in Bratton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1545, in Westbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bathsheba Barrett est née en 1518, à Aveley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Barrett, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Love, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Oxford en 1540, à Bratton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1545, à Westbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bathsheba Barrett 1518 in Aveley, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Barrett 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Love 29. Sie hat 1540 in Bratton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Oxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1545 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Westbury, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bathsheba Barrett è nata il nel 1518 nel Aveley, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Barrett, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Love, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Oxford nel 1540, nel Bratton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1545, nel Westbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bathsheba Barrettが1518年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエイベリーで生まれた時，父William Barrettは31歳，母Margaret Loveは29歳であった。1540年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラットオンでThomas Oxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウエストブリーで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bathsheba Barrett(이)가 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에벨리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Barrett(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Love(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 브래턴에서 Thomas Oxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 윌츠히르 웨스트버이에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bathsheba Barrett nasceu em 1518, em Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Barrett, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Love, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Oxford em 1540, em Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1545, em Westbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bathsheba Barrett родилась в 1518 г. в местности авели, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Barrett было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Love, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Oxford в 1540 г. в местности браттон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1545 г. в местности вестбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bathsheba Barrett nació en 1518, en Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Barrett, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Love, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Thomas Oxford en 1540, en Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1545, en Westbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años.
